opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My lower stomach is in agony, I desperately need to pee but only a few drops are coming out no matter how hard I push.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain came on this evening and I've barely passed anything for about six hours — I don't know what to do and I live on my own.

symptom_narrative.onset: the severe pain and near-total blockage started about six hours ago; the trouble going to the toilet has been building up for the last year and got much worse over the last day
symptom_narrative.duration: about six hours of agony and barely passing anything
symptom_narrative.character: a bursting, aching pain low down in the middle of my belly; when I try to go it's a weak, stop-start trickle and I have to strain really hard, and it never feels empty afterwards
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain is unbearable, I'm pacing the room and can't sit still
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right down low in the middle of my stomach, above the pubic bone
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant now; before this I was up several times every night to go and going very often in the daytime
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing helps — straining and pushing just hurts more
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: the longer I hold on the worse the pain gets, and pushing hard doesn't bring anything out
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've been getting up loads at night to try to go, my sleep is wrecked, and earlier I had a couple of accidents where I leaked before I could get there
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never this bad — but the slow, weak stream and getting up at night have crept up over the past year
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't rest, I'm exhausted from no sleep, and I'm frightened being on my own with this

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: trouble with my waterworks for a while — slow to start and a weak stream
past_medical_history.when_diagnosed: gradually over the past year, never properly looked into
past_medical_history.how_managed: nothing, I just put up with it

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: an over-the-counter cold and sinus tablet with a decongestant in it
current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: started a few days ago for a head cold

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; worried about tripping on the loose rugs on the way to the bathroom at night

objective_data_offered.value: only a few drops in the last six hours no matter how hard I push
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient estimate, not a measured voided volume

objective_data_offered.value: pacing the room, visibly uncomfortable, repeatedly holding the lower abdomen
